source_files: src/systems/screen_mesh_tick.js (SM subsystem driving screens each tick)
src/systems/screen_interaction.js (UV raycast + virtual cursor on screens)
notes: Mesh-spec is a 4-part group: base + stand + frame + panel. The panel is a PlaneGeometry — today it's a flat colored material (dim blue with green emissive for the 'on but no content' look).

canvas_resolution_w/h (1024×640) — preserved for the future screen-render facet that will paint a HTML5 canvas texture onto the panel each tick. The substrate today does NOT include that handler; this iter is the static screen body only.

Dynamic content (jumbotron text, sky animation, server-process list, build console buttons + cursor) all wait on the screen-render facet. That facet is likely the actor-model lift trigger (per docs/ACTOR_TRAJECTORY.md) because the screen needs to consume data from elsewhere — natural place for {to, message} envelopes.
Colors: frame 0x121212 (1184274), panel 0x0b0030 base color (720944) + emissive 0x45c500 (4569600) for the on-state glow, stand+base 0x303030 (3158064)
